Identity.text: Your place and year of birth
Can you describe your home in a few words?

Family.text: Are you married, in a civil partnership, or living together? What is your partner's name?
Do you have children? Can you give us their names and ages?
Do you have brothers and sisters? What are their names?
Are there other family members who have special importance to you?

Friends and social networks.text: Can you tell me about a long-time friend and your relationship?
Are there different groups of friends in your life?
Are there friends or people close to you who particularly support you day to day?
Are there people who have drifted away from you in recent years?
Do you have other social networks that matter to you? (association, club, people you met on social media…)

Routine and daily life.text: What does a typical day look like for you?
Are you more of a morning person or an evening person?
What puts you in a good mood in the morning?
Do you have rituals or habits that give rhythm to your day?
What is your favorite spot at home?

Food and pleasures.text: Do you have any food allergies or intolerances?
What are your favorite dishes or cuisines?
Are there foods that you absolutely dislike?
Do you enjoy cooking, or do you have a favorite recipe?
Do you have a guilty pleasure food?

Hobbies and entertainment.text: What TV shows or series are you watching right now?
Do you enjoy games (board games, video games, crosswords, sudoku…)?
Do you follow a sport or a particular team?
Do you use social media? Which ones?
Do you have a podcast, YouTube channel, or radio show you enjoy listening to?
Is there something you are passionate about right now?

Animals and nature.text: Do you have a pet? What is its name?
Do you enjoy nature? Is there a landscape or natural place that is dear to you?

Travel and places.text: Is there a trip or a place that has particularly marked you?
If you could be anywhere in the world right now, where would you be?

Personality and character traits.text: How would you describe your personality in a few words?
How do you react to difficulties or obstacles?
Do you use humor or irony in your way of communicating?

Style and appearance.text: If you had to describe yourself physically to someone who has never seen you, what would you say?
How would you describe your usual clothing style (e.g. classic, casual, original, elegant…)?
Do you have accessories (jewelry, scarves, hats, watches) that you like to wear? Do they have a special story?

Communication preferences.text: What topics do you most enjoy talking about?
Are there subjects you prefer to avoid?
How do you like to be addressed (formal, informal, nickname…)?

Professional background.text: What is or has been your main profession?
Can you tell me about professional projects that you are particularly proud of?
How has your career evolved over the years?

Artistic and cultural tastes.text: What music do you listen to when you want to relax?
What are your favorite films or directors?
Do you like to read? Who are your favorite authors or literary genres?
Do you have personal artistic passions or do you practice an art form?

Opinions and values.text: What are your main values in life?
Are there causes or social issues that are particularly important to you?
How do you envision the future?

Experience with illness.text: Could you describe how you reacted when you received your diagnosis?
What has been the most difficult thing to accept about your condition?
Has your health situation changed your perspective on life? If so, could you say how?
What advice would you give to someone going through a similar situation?
Are there positive aspects that you have gained from this experience?

Equipment and adaptations.text: What equipment or assistive devices do you use on a daily basis?
Is there a piece of equipment that has particularly improved your quality of life?

Personal history and memories.text: Can you share a childhood memory that marked you?
Can you mention a decisive moment or a turning point in your life?
Is there a period of your life that you consider the happiest?
If you had to summarize your life journey so far in a few sentences, what would you say?

Aspirations.text: What are your current hopes or goals?
What would you like others to say about you in the future?
Are there particular messages you would like to communicate to your loved ones?
How would you like your personal story to influence others?
